channel.title: nehwe.tech on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO
channel.description: Recent content in nehwe.tech on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO

item.title: Cybersecurity Services
item.description:
Most small businesses don’t need a full internal security team — they need someone senior to tell them, clearly, where the actual risk is and what to fix first.

I work with small and mid-sized businesses in Colorado Springs who need real security coverage without standing up an internal team, and with teams who already have one and want an outside set of eyes.

item.title: Website Design & Development
item.description: I design and build websites the way a security engineer builds a website: fast by default, hardened by default, and without the plugin bloat that turns a marketing site into an attack surface.

item.title: AI & Process Automation
item.description: Most “AI automation” pitches are vague. Mine isn’t: I look at the specific spreadsheets, forms, and approval chains that eat your team’s week, and automate the parts that don’t need a human judgment call.

item.title: About
item.description: I started in telecommunications and network engineering before moving into cybersecurity and compliance work — which means I think about a system the way an attacker, an auditor, and an engineer all would at once.
